case_title: GWC INVESTMENTS, LLC, DOING BUSINESS AS 50 CUTLER VS. RYAN C CHEAL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GWC INVESTMENTS, LLC, DOING BUSINESS AS 50 CUTLER AVENUE APARTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT CHEAL, RYAN C DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
